actions.tutorialInfo: Target allied character in your hex: gain Fortified (3 turns).

actions.description: Target enemy character in your hex: apply Fear (1 turn) and Halted (1 turn), with 10% chance to apply MorgulTouch.
actions.tutorialInfo: Target enemy character in your hex: apply Fear (1 turn) and Halted (1 turn), with 10% chance to apply MorgulTouch.

actions.description: Remove all your Gold. Add +5 Timber, +5 Iron, +5 Steel. Gain +2 Fortification at your capital.
actions.tutorialInfo: Remove all your Gold. Add +5 Timber, +5 Iron, +5 Steel. Gain +2 Fortification at your capital.

actions.description: Target allied character in your hex: gain Fortified (1 turn).
actions.tutorialInfo: Target allied character in your hex: gain Fortified (1 turn).

actions.description: Target allied character in your hex: heal a small amount and gain Haste (1 turn).
actions.tutorialInfo: Target allied character in your hex: heal a small amount and gain Haste (1 turn).

actions.description: Target allied army commander in your hex: gain +1 permanent Commander and lose 1 unit of the weakest army troop type.
actions.tutorialInfo: Target allied army commander in your hex: gain +1 permanent Commander and lose 1 unit of the weakest army troop type.

actions.description: All naval or embarked units on water/shore tiles take moderate damage and are Halted (1 turn).
actions.tutorialInfo: All naval or embarked units on water/shore tiles take moderate damage and are Halted (1 turn).

actions.description: All allied units in radius 2 gain Hope (1 turn) and lose Fear/Despair.
actions.tutorialInfo: All allied units in radius 2 gain Hope (1 turn) and lose Fear/Despair.

actions.description: All allied elves in radius 1 gain Fortified (1 turn) and lose Fear.
actions.tutorialInfo: All allied elves in radius 1 gain Fortified (1 turn) and lose Fear.

actions.description: Allied units in radius 1 gain Fortified and ArcaneInsight (1 turn); enemies in radius 1 gain Despair (1 turn).
actions.tutorialInfo: Allied units in radius 1 gain Fortified and ArcaneInsight (1 turn); enemies in radius 1 gain Despair (1 turn).

actions.description: Target allied character gains Hope (2 turns) and removes Fear/Despair.
actions.tutorialInfo: Target allied character gains Hope (2 turns) and removes Fear/Despair.

actions.description: Target allied character: heal 15 HP and remove Poisoned/Burning.
actions.tutorialInfo: Target allied character: heal 15 HP and remove Poisoned/Burning.

actions.description: Allied Humans/Dunedain in radius 1 gain Hope (1 turn); caster gains ArcaneInsight (1 turn).
actions.tutorialInfo: Allied Humans/Dunedain in radius 1 gain Hope (1 turn); caster gains ArcaneInsight (1 turn).

actions.description: Remove negative status effects in an area of 2 hexes from caster.
actions.tutorialInfo: Remove negative status effects in an area of 2 hexes from caster.

actions.description: At a mountain or population center, allied Dwarf commanders in your hex and adjacent hexes gain Fortified (1) and Strengthened (1); enemy commanders there gain Fear (1).
actions.tutorialInfo: At a mountain or population center, allied Dwarf commanders in your hex and adjacent hexes gain Fortified (1) and Strengthened (1); enemy commanders there gain Fear (1).

actions.description: Enemy units in your hex are Halted (1 turn); caster gains Hidden (2 turns).
actions.tutorialInfo: Enemy units in your hex are Halted (1 turn); caster gains Hidden (2 turns).

actions.description: Allied Dunedain in radius 2 gain Courage (1 turn), and the caster scouts radius 2.
actions.tutorialInfo: Allied Dunedain in radius 2 gain Courage (1 turn), and the caster scouts radius 2.

actions.description: All allied army commanders in mountains or hills gain Haste (1 turn) and Courage (1 turn).
actions.tutorialInfo: All allied army commanders in mountains or hills gain Haste (1 turn) and Courage (1 turn).

actions.description: Allied Human units gain Strengthened (1 turn).
actions.tutorialInfo: Allied Human units gain Strengthened (1 turn).

actions.description: Enemy units in radius 1 gain Fear (1 turn) and Halted (1 turn).
actions.tutorialInfo: Enemy units in radius 1 gain Fear (1 turn) and Halted (1 turn).

actions.description: Allied Dwarves in radius 2 gain Hope (1 turn) and Strengthened (1 turn).
actions.tutorialInfo: Allied Dwarves in radius 2 gain Hope (1 turn) and Strengthened (1 turn).

actions.description: The two easternmost allied armies gain +1 HC and +1 LC.
actions.tutorialInfo: The two easternmost allied armies gain +1 HC and +1 LC.

actions.description: If the caster is not in an army, return the caster to capital.
actions.tutorialInfo: If the caster is not in an army, return the caster to capital.

actions.description: Target enemy character in your hex: apply Poisoned (2 turns).
actions.tutorialInfo: Target enemy character in your hex: apply Poisoned (2 turns).

actions.description: Cancels refuse a duel and if you are issued a duel, you automatically win it (1 turn).
actions.tutorialInfo: Cancels refuse a duel and if you are issued a duel, you automatically win it (1 turn).

actions.description: Target allied character in your hex: gain ArcaneInsight (1 turn), and your next FindArtifact here is easier.
actions.tutorialInfo: Target allied character in your hex: gain ArcaneInsight (1 turn), and your next FindArtifact here is easier.

actions.description: If any Free People character holds a Palantir, remove it from the character and hide it in a random water hex.
actions.tutorialInfo: If any Free People character holds a Palantir, remove it from the character and hide it in a random water hex.

actions.description: Up to 3 Dunedain in radius 3 are affected: one gains +1 Commander, one +1 Agent, and one +1 Emmissary.
actions.tutorialInfo: Up to 3 Dunedain in radius 3 are affected: one gains +1 Commander, one +1 Agent, and one +1 Emmissary.

actions.description: Target allied Nazgul in your hex gains +1 Commander and +1 Mage.
actions.tutorialInfo: Target allied Nazgul in your hex gains +1 Commander and +1 Mage.

actions.description: If you are on a forest hex, gain +3 timber; beast- or Ent-race characters here are moderately wounded.
actions.tutorialInfo: If you are on a forest hex, gain +3 timber; beast- or Ent-race characters here are moderately wounded.

actions.description: Block target enemy character for 1 turn. If it is a Maia, block it for 3 turns.
actions.tutorialInfo: Block target enemy character for 1 turn. If it is a Maia, block it for 3 turns.

actions.description: All Nazgul gain Haste (3 turns).
actions.tutorialInfo: All Nazgul gain Haste (3 turns).

actions.description: Target enemy character in your hex: apply Blocked (1 turn) and Poisoned (2 turns).
actions.tutorialInfo: Target enemy character in your hex: apply Blocked (1 turn) and Poisoned (2 turns).

actions.description: Target allied character in your hex gains Fortified (1 turn) and Strengthened (1 turn); your nation gains +1 gold and +1 mithril.
actions.tutorialInfo: Target allied character in your hex gains Fortified (1 turn) and Strengthened (1 turn); your nation gains +1 gold and +1 mithril.

actions.description: All Easterling units gain Courage (1 turn).
actions.tutorialInfo: All Easterling units gain Courage (1 turn).

actions.description: All allied units in radius 2 gain Strengthened (1 turn).
actions.tutorialInfo: All allied units in radius 2 gain Strengthened (1 turn).

actions.description: Target allied Elf in your hex gains ArcaneInsight (1 turn).
actions.tutorialInfo: Target allied Elf in your hex gains ArcaneInsight (1 turn).

actions.description: All allied armies in radius 2 gain Fortified (1 turn).
actions.tutorialInfo: All allied armies in radius 2 gain Fortified (1 turn).

actions.description: All allies in radius 1 gain Strengthened and Haste (1 turn).
actions.tutorialInfo: All allies in radius 1 gain Strengthened and Haste (1 turn).

actions.description: All allied armies in radius 2 gain Haste (3 turns).
actions.tutorialInfo: All allied armies in radius 2 gain Haste (3 turns).

actions.description: Event card: Kindle Dawnfire.
actions.tutorialInfo: Event card. Grant Courage to all Free People units on the map for a short duration; dispels Doors of Night.

actions.description: Event card: Ward Against the Eye.
actions.tutorialInfo: Target allied Elf in your hex gains ArcaneInsight (1 turn).

actions.description: Event card: Steward's Muster.
actions.tutorialInfo: Allied Human units gain Strengthened (1 turn).

actions.description: Event card: Hallow the Road.
actions.tutorialInfo: Provide Courage to all Hobbits and Dwarves in a radius of 2.

actions.description: Event card: Oath of the Westfold.
actions.tutorialInfo: Environmental event: grant Courage (1 turn) and Hope (1 turn) to all Human and Dunedain units within radius 3.

actions.description: Event card: Morgul Tithe.
actions.tutorialInfo: Enemy units in radius 1 gain Fear (1 turn) and Halted (1 turn).

actions.description: Event card: Eye's Tribute.
actions.tutorialInfo: All allies in radius 1 gain Strengthened and Haste (1 turn).

actions.description: Event card: Black Gate Sortie.
actions.tutorialInfo: All allied army commanders in mountains or hills gain Haste (1 turn) and Courage (1 turn).

actions.description: Event card: Shroud of Gorgoroth.
actions.tutorialInfo: Event card. Grant Courage to all Dark Servants units on the map for a short duration.

actions.description: Event card: Chains of the Lidless Eye.
actions.tutorialInfo: All Nazgul gain Haste (3 turns).

actions.description: Event card: Wormtongue's Whisper.
actions.tutorialInfo: All allied units in radius 2 gain Strengthened (1 turn).

actions.description: Event card: Furnaces of Isengard.
actions.tutorialInfo: If you are on a forest hex, gain +3 timber; beast- or Ent-race characters here are moderately wounded.

actions.description: Event card: Uruk Vanguard.
actions.tutorialInfo: All allied armies in radius 2 gain Fortified (1 turn).

actions.description: Event card: False Parley.
actions.tutorialInfo: The two easternmost allied armies gain +1 HC and +1 LC.

actions.description: Event card: Storm from Orthanc.
actions.tutorialInfo: Environmental event: freezes enemy units on mountain tiles in radius 5.

actions.description: In radius 2, enemies gain Fear (1 turn) and Hobbits gain Hope (1 turn).
actions.tutorialInfo: In radius 2, enemies gain Fear (1 turn) and Hobbits gain Hope (1 turn).

actions.description: Radius 2: Hobbits become Hidden (1 turn). Enemy non-Hobbits are Halted (1 turn).
actions.tutorialInfo: Radius 2: Hobbits become Hidden (1 turn). Enemy non-Hobbits are Halted (1 turn).

actions.description: Radius 2: enemies get Refusing Duels (1 turn), Hobbits gain Haste (1 turn).
actions.tutorialInfo: Radius 2: enemies get Refusing Duels (1 turn), Hobbits gain Haste (1 turn).

actions.description: Radius 2: allies gain Encouraged (1 turn), enemies are Blocked (1 turn).
actions.tutorialInfo: Radius 2: allies gain Encouraged (1 turn), enemies are Blocked (1 turn).

actions.description: Radius 1: enemy non-army characters are Halted (1 turn), allied Hobbits and Humans become Hidden (1 turn).
actions.tutorialInfo: Radius 1: enemy non-army characters are Halted (1 turn), allied Hobbits and Humans become Hidden (1 turn).

actions.description: Grave tidings race ahead of Gandalf: allied Humans and Dunedain in radius 2 gain Courage for 1 turn, while enemy Humans and Dunedain in radius 2 gain Fear and Refusing Duels for 1 turn.
actions.tutorialInfo: Grave tidings race ahead of Gandalf: allied Humans and Dunedain in radius 2 gain Courage for 1 turn, while enemy Humans and Dunedain in radius 2 gain Fear and Refusing Duels for 1 turn.

actions.description: Uneasy rumor spreads through the watch: in radius 2, allied Humans and Dunedain become Hidden for 1 turn, while enemy Humans and Dunedain are Halted for 1 turn.
actions.tutorialInfo: Uneasy rumor spreads through the watch: in radius 2, allied Humans and Dunedain become Hidden for 1 turn, while enemy Humans and Dunedain are Halted for 1 turn.

actions.description: Dark birds wheel over a crossing and rumor outruns certainty: in radius 2, allied Humans and Dunedain gain Haste for 1 turn, while enemy Humans and Dunedain gain Fear and Halted for 1 turn.
actions.tutorialInfo: Dark birds wheel over a crossing and rumor outruns certainty: in radius 2, allied Humans and Dunedain gain Haste for 1 turn, while enemy Humans and Dunedain gain Fear and Halted for 1 turn.

actions.description: Hard truth steadies some and crushes others: in radius 2, allied Humans and Dunedain gain Hope for 1 turn, while enemy Humans and Dunedain gain Despair for 1 turn.
actions.tutorialInfo: Hard truth steadies some and crushes others: in radius 2, allied Humans and Dunedain gain Hope for 1 turn, while enemy Humans and Dunedain gain Despair for 1 turn.

actions.description: War-front crossing control: all allied units on shore or water-adjacent hexes gain Fortified for 1 turn, and all enemy units on shore or water-adjacent hexes are Halted for 1 turn.
actions.tutorialInfo: War-front crossing control: all allied units on shore or water-adjacent hexes gain Fortified for 1 turn, and all enemy units on shore or water-adjacent hexes are Halted for 1 turn.

actions.description: Reveal the hexes of the nearest 3 enemy units at sea.
actions.tutorialInfo: Reveal the hexes of the nearest 3 enemy units at sea.

actions.description: Gandalf's unwelcome warning stiffens a threatened haven: gain +4 to +8 loyalty in the current PC.
actions.tutorialInfo: Gandalf's unwelcome warning stiffens a threatened haven: gain +4 to +8 loyalty in the current PC.
